channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: LANY @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-04-04 02:30 — LANY at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. LANY has a strong reputation for their engaging live performances and emotional pop sound, making this show a must-see.

item.title: The Strokes @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-04-07 02:30 — The Strokes at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Strokes are iconic in the indie rock scene, and their live shows are known for high energy and nostalgia.

item.title: FKA twigs @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-04-08 03:00 — FKA twigs at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. FKA twigs is celebrated for her innovative performances and unique sound, promising a captivating live experience.

item.title: Bad Omens @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-03-28 02:00 — Bad Omens at Oakland Arena. Bad Omens is gaining traction in the alt scene, and their upcoming tour is generating significant buzz.

item.title: Jackson Wang @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-04-03 03:00 — Jackson Wang at Oakland Arena. Jackson Wang's fusion of pop and performance art is drawing attention, making this a standout event.

item.title: Sticky Fingers @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-04-07 03:00 — Sticky Fingers at The Masonic. Sticky Fingers brings a unique blend of reggae and rock, promising a lively and fun concert experience.

item.title: Sarah Kinsley @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-31 03:00 — Sarah Kinsley at August Hall. The Midnight is known for their nostalgic synth-pop sound and engaging live shows, appealing to a dedicated fanbase.

item.title: Goldie Boutilier @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-30 03:00 — Goldie Boutilier at August Hall. Calum Scott's heartfelt ballads and strong vocal performances make his shows emotionally resonant.

item.title: Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-04-14 02:30 — Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band at Chase Center. Bruce Springsteen's legendary status and dynamic performances ensure a memorable concert experience.

item.title: The Early November @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-04-02 02:30 — The Early November at August Hall. The Early November's nostalgic sound resonates with fans of early 2000s emo, making this a notable reunion show.

item.title: Dave @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-04-01 03:00 — Dave at Fox Theater - Oakland. Dave's unique storytelling and engaging stage presence make his performance a highly anticipated event.

item.title: Jeff Tweedy @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-03-28 02:30 — Jeff Tweedy at Uptown Theatre Napa. Jeff Tweedy's solo performances are intimate and showcase his songwriting prowess, appealing to fans of indie folk.

item.title: Rhye @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-04-25 03:00 — Rhye at August Hall. Rhye's smooth sound and intimate performances create a captivating atmosphere for concertgoers.

item.title: Father John Misty @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-03-25 03:00 → 2026-03-26 03:00 — Father John Misty at The Castro Theatre. The Disco Biscuits are known for their unique blend of jam and electronic music, creating a lively concert experience.

item.title: The Format @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-04-17 01:50 — The Format at The Castro Theatre. The Format's return is generating excitement among fans of alternative rock, promising a nostalgic experience.

item.title: Hatsune Miku @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-04-23 03:00 — Hatsune Miku at San Jose Civic. Hatsune Miku's unique virtual performances attract a dedicated fanbase, making this a special event.

item.title: The Summer Set @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-04-12 03:00 — The Summer Set at August Hall. Good Kid's rising popularity and engaging live shows make their performance a noteworthy event.
